response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES SHE USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 80 DIVIDED BY 2 EQUALS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. NOW, WE WILL CHECK THAT ALL WORDS ARE UNIQUE AND THAT WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS APPEAR AT LEAST 21 TIMES. THE WORD "ENVELOPES" APPEARS 4 TIMES, AND THE WORD "LETTERS" APPEARS 2 TIMES. THE WORD "TOTAL" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "WRITTEN" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "MOST" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "REMAINING" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "CONTAIN" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "EACH" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "THE" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "WE" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "DIVIDED" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "EQUALS" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "TO" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "FIND" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "HOW" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "WE" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "USED" APPEARS 1 TIME. THE WORD "ENVELOPES" APPEARS 4 TIMES. THE WORD "LETTERS" APPEARS 2 TIMES.
